type: Qualitative Comparison Grid（论文级多方法多样本对比网格）
goal: 生成语义分割定性对比图：5 列 × 4 行，类调色板一致、Ours 列高亮，英文图题

row_labels.style: small monospace row ids on the left, optional italic 'Easy / Hard' tag if space

options_explained.segmentation_mask: semi-transparent class-colored overlay on shared RGB; consistent Cityscapes palette: road, sidewalk, building, sky, vegetation, vehicle, person, etc.

cell_content.consistency_rule: all cells in a row the same city scene; boundaries comparable across columns

zoom_in_boxes.rule: identical 120×80 px crop box on a thin pole / bike region in each cell of a chosen row, tiny inset under that row with connector lines if layout allows
zoom_in_boxes.callout_style: red rectangle same pixel coords in FCN, DeepLab, Mask2Former, Ours for fair edge comparison

caption.label: Figure 6.
caption.text: Qualitative results on Cityscapes val. Ours recovers object boundaries in occluded regions (see zoomed crops).

must_keep: class colors fixed across all columns
Ours last column with emphasis border
avoid: missing [n] for baselines if journal requires — here filled as FCN/DeepLab/Mask2Former citations
